title: psydrax dicoccos var. obovatifolius
intro:
Psydrax dicoccos var. obovatifolius, also known as the 'small-leaf Psydrax', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa. It is a type of flowering shrub that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Psydrax dicoccos var. obovatifolius include treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. 

Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties. However, more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
